title: CT17.N19 completed discharge record — C1 — arithmetic target hit
description: Concrete completed-discharge schema for CT17.N19, the certificate node “C1 — arithmetic target hit” of tactic CT17 (Target thickening). It refines the common node-proof record with this node's exact identity, completion state, assigned contract evidence, and any required payload or terminal certificate.

tacticId.description: Framework tactic discriminator for CT17.N19. It must be exactly `CT17`, selecting Target thickening (target thickening) as the tactic that owns the certificate step “C1 — arithmetic target hit” in the exhaustive proof flow.

nodeId.description: Stable graph-node identifier for the obligation “C1 — arithmetic target hit”. It must be exactly `CT17.N19` so the evidence, dependencies, outgoing branch, and any terminal result are attributed to this step rather than another node.

nodeNumber.description: One-based ordinal of CT17.N19 within tactic CT17 (Target thickening). It must be exactly 19, matching the N19 suffix and the node's position in that tactic graph.

status.description: Required completion state for CT17.N19. It must be exactly `validated`, meaning that the node's certificate, trigger, or other validation obligation has been checked for the certificate obligation “C1 — arithmetic target hit”; another lifecycle value does not discharge this concrete node.

dischargedContracts.description: Contract identifiers whose proof obligations are discharged at CT17.N19. The array must contain `A-Cert`, `S-Equiv`; these are precisely the contracts assigned to “C1 — arithmetic target hit”. Listing an identifier records discharge status but does not replace the matching typed evidence record required in `contractInstances`.

contains.description: Requires `A-Cert` to occur in CT17.N19's discharged-contract list, because this node must use the contract that validates a terminal certificate from the named witness and prerequisite contract records for the obligation “C1 — arithmetic target hit”.

Requires `S-Equiv` to occur in CT17.N19's discharged-contract list, because this node must use the contract that proves the required two-way response equivalence in every declared context for the obligation “C1 — arithmetic target hit”.

contractInstances.description: Typed contract-evidence records that justify CT17.N19 from the recorded branch state. The array must contain at least one instance for every assigned schema: A-Cert (certificateClass, validationStatement, witnessRefs, requiredContractRefs, evidence); S-Equiv (left, right, contextClass, responseCriterion, evidence). Every instance must include its schema discriminator and nonempty evidence as required by the referenced contract definition; together the records must establish the displayed node statement.

schema.description: Contract discriminator for a `A-Cert` evidence instance at CT17.N19. It must be exactly `A-Cert`, identifying the contract that validates a terminal certificate from the named witness and prerequisite contract records; the same instance must supply certificateClass, validationStatement, witnessRefs, requiredContractRefs, evidence.

Contract discriminator for a `S-Equiv` evidence instance at CT17.N19. It must be exactly `S-Equiv`, identifying the contract that proves the required two-way response equivalence in every declared context; the same instance must supply left, right, contextClass, responseCriterion, evidence.

certificate.description: Terminal certificate emitted when CT17.N19 closes its branch. It must be exactly `C1`, the framework's certificate for direct target closure; the node's `A-Cert` instance and companion contracts must validate “C1 — arithmetic target hit”.

statement.informal: Validate or verify: C1 — arithmetic target hit

x-obligation.dischargeCriteria: Provide a proof/definition/computation artifact that establishes the displayed statement from the recorded branch state and satisfies every listed contract schema.
